exhibits.name: Financial Statements
contents: Independent Auditor's Report (unqualified opinion, Melville NY auditor, dated March 11, 2025)
Balance Sheets as of Dec 31, 2024 and Oct 31, 2023
Statements of Operations and Changes in Member's Deficit for 14-month period ended Dec 31, 2024 and FY ended Oct 31, 2023 and 2022
Statements of Cash Flows for same periods

Notes to Financial Statements (8 notes): Organization, Accounting Policies, Adopted Standards, Franchised Outlets, Revenues and Contract Balances, Related-Party Transactions, Marketing Fund, Commitments and Contingencies

exhibits.name: Franchise Agreement (and Exhibits)
contents: Franchise Agreement (20 sections): Key Definitions, Grant, Term/Renewal, Fees, Advertising, Development/Opening, Training/Assistance, Intellectual Property, Business Image/Operating Standards, Records/Reports, Inspections/Audits, Confidential Information, Covenants, Assignment, Termination, Post-Termination Obligations, Relationship/Indemnification, Enforcement, Notices, Acknowledgements
FA Exhibit A: Authorized Location and Opening Deadline
FA Exhibit B: Ownership and Management Addendum
FA Exhibit C: Business Lease Addendum
FA Exhibit D: Guaranty and Assumption of Obligations
FA Exhibit E: Disclosure Acknowledgment Addendum
exhibits.extraction_note: Key terms extracted via Item 17 tables and targeted page reads. Not all 52 pages itemized line-by-line.

exhibits.name: Multi-Unit Development Agreement (and Exhibits)
contents: Multi-Unit Development Agreement (15 sections): similar structure to FA including Grant, Development Schedule, Fees, Advertising/Marketing, Training, IP, Covenants, Assignment, Termination, Enforcement
MUD Exhibit A: Designated Area and Development Schedule
MUD Exhibit B: Ownership Addendum
MUD Exhibit C: Guaranty and Assumption of Obligations
MUD Exhibit D: Disclosure Acknowledgment Addendum
exhibits.extraction_note: Key terms extracted via Item 17 MUD table. Non-compete (Section 12), Transfer (Section 13), Termination (Section 14) read in detail.

exhibits.name: Franchisee List
contents: Current Franchisees as of December 31, 2024: 17 open locations across 8 operators
Signed but not open: 5 groups with 47+ franchise agreements
Former Franchisees: 1 (Amanda Vachon, Madison AL — remains in system, closed a studio)

exhibits.name: List of State Administrators; Agents for Service of Process
contents: State administrators and agents for service of process
New York listed explicitly (NYS DOL Investor Protection Bureau, NY Dept of State)

exhibits.name: State Addenda
contents: California Addendum (FDD + FA): Non-compete may not be enforceable; franchise fee deferral by DFPI; release/waiver limits
Illinois Addendum (FDD + FA): IL law governs; venue outside IL void; anti-waiver provisions
Maryland Addendum (FDD + FA): May bring suit in MD; 3-year statute of limitations; release limits

Minnesota Addendum (FDD + FA): Fee deferral until open; 90-day termination notice; 180-day non-renewal notice; no liquidated damages; indemnification for trademark claims; jury trial waiver may not be enforceable
New York Addendum (FDD + FA): Registration notice; release does not waive GBL claims; NY franchise law governs
Virginia Addendum (FDD + FA + MUD): Fee deferral until pre-opening obligations complete; reasonable cause for termination required
Washington Addendum (FDD + FA + MUD): Franchisee Bill of Rights (RCW 19.100.180); fair pricing; treble damages; anti-waiver; no punitive damages waiver; no forced buy-back without good cause

exhibits.name: State Effective Dates and Receipt Pages
contents: State Effective Dates: Michigan 3/11/25, Minnesota 3/19/25, New York 3/24/25; California, Illinois, Indiana, Maryland, Virginia, Washington pending
Receipt (franchisor copy) — page 176
Receipt (franchisee copy) — page 177
